title: Parodia scopa
taxonomy: Parodia scopa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Parodia, which is a group of cacti that are native to South America. Parodia scopa is further classified as a member of the subgenus Notocactus, which is a subgroup of Parodia. This plant is also sometimes classified under the genus Notocactus, but it is commonly recognized as Parodia scopa. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the taxonomic system used.
